integrity_pulse.name: Integrity Pulse
integrity_pulse.description: Emit a stabilizing pulse that reinforces structural integrity and restores stability.

core_lock.name: Core Lock
core_lock.description: Apply a precise suppression lock that weakens the target’s offensive output.

order_strike.name: Order Strike
order_strike.description: Deliver a clean, controlled strike that maintains perfectly stable damage.

shield_bloom.name: Shield Bloom
shield_bloom.description: Generate a blooming shield of pure system energy that absorbs incoming damage.

purity_wave.name: Purity Wave
purity_wave.description: Release a cleansing wave that purifies minor disruptions and strengthens resistance.

fortify_matrix.name: Fortify Matrix
fortify_matrix.description: Construct a fortified matrix that enhances defense and stability regeneration.

corebind_seal.name: Corebind Seal
corebind_seal.description: Invoke a binding seal of pure order that slows the target and weakens their next move.

integrity_field.name: Integrity Field
integrity_field.description: Project a wide field of stabilized energy that reduces incoming damage over time.

system_recalibrate.name: System Recalibrate
system_recalibrate.description: Recalibrate internal systems, clearing instability and empowering the next technique.

special.name: SPECIAL
special.description: A hidden Core technique reserved for future awakening.
